title.en: Xuan Void Holy Realm, War Realm Void.

content.en:
Xuan Void Holy Realm, War Realm Void.

The light-clothed saintess lives here, after all, you can enter the War Realm Tower at any time, and you can contact the Saint Maiden Gate at the first time, even if you really encounter danger, you can hide in the War Realm Tower, so most of the domain ancestors live in the War Realm Void.

this day.

Ye Tian came here and appeared outside the mansion of the light-clothed saintess.

When Ye Tian arrived, the light-clothed saintess knew.

"Come in, the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws!"

The voice of the lightly-clad saint came out.

Ye Tian entered the mansion of the light-clothed saintess and saw the light-clothed saintess.

"Light-clothed saintess, long time no see!"

Ye Tian saw the daughter in light clothes and said with a smile.

"The Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws, it's true that I haven't seen you for a long time, I should have visited you, but you are probably busy, so I didn't bother!" The lightly-clothed Holy Maiden said: "I don't know what the Holy Son of Ten Thousand Laws is looking for me, it shouldn't be reminiscing, right?"

"There's something that needs to be troubled, the light-clothed saint!"

Ye Tian said directly.

"What?"

The light-clothed saint was a little curious.

Ye Tian's face became serious, and he said, "I don't know if the light-clothed saint has a jade bottle in her hand?" If there is, I want to borrow it for a while!"

"Jade Bottle !!"

The lightly-clothed saint also became solemn.

If it's an ordinary treasure, it's just that, but the jade bottle is a holy thing, how precious it is!

However, Ye Tian once saved her life, and she couldn't deceive Ye Tian, so she said truthfully: "Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, I do have a jade net bottle in my hand, but the jade net bottle is very valuable, and it belongs to the Holy Maiden Gate, even if I lose it, I can't explain it to the Holy Maiden Gate." Besides, I am also using the Jade Purity Bottle to continuously refine the domain body and domain power, if I lend it to you temporarily, my cultivation speed will be many times slower!"

These words are tantamount to rejection!

The light-clothed saintess would not lend the jade bottle to Ye Tian just because Ye Tian had saved her, after all, people are selfish, so naturally they would not sacrifice their own cultivation process to fulfill others.

Of course, if it is the help of other aspects, she may help, but when it comes to the jade bottle, it will definitely not work.

Ye Tian's refusal of the light-clothed saintess was not strange at all, after all, if it were him, he might also refuse directly.

However, he will not just give up.

"Light-clothed Holy Maiden, you can make any conditions, and I am willing to exchange any price for the opportunity to temporarily borrow the Jade Pure Bottle. Of course, it has to be something I can do and not ask too much!" Ye Tian said.

The light-clothed saint wanted to continue refusing, but suddenly thought of something, so she was silent for a while.

At this time, the light-clothed saint maiden said seriously: "Ten Thousand Laws Holy Son, I really need your help with something, if you are willing to agree, I can temporarily lend you the jade pure bottle to cultivate for a period of time." "

"Please!"

Ye Tian said happily.

"I want a promise!"

The light-clothed saint said.

"Promise?" Ye Tian was a little puzzled, not knowing what he meant by the lightly clothed girl.

At this time, the light-clothed saintess continued, "Do you know what is the most precious opportunity in the Holy Realm?"

"I don't know!"

Ye Tian shook his head.

In fact, he didn't know much about the Holy Realm, after all, he was not in the Dark Sacred Realm, and a lot of knowledge could not be thoroughly understood, and the knowledge he only knew through the Zhanmen Library Pavilion was limited, and he didn't understand a lot of knowledge unless he went to check it specifically.

The light-clothed saint said with a smile: "There are so many holy realms in the dark holy realm, and almost all of them are controlled by the holy land and the ten holy gates, so most of the forces don't know what the most precious opportunity of the holy realm is. The biggest opportunity of the Holy Realm is the Holy Monument, a Holy Realm will only give birth to one Holy Monument, and the number of Holy Monuments is limited, some Holy Realm Holy Monuments only have a few hundred places, and some have thousands of places. The quota of the Holy Monument is to allow the Domain Ancestors to have an independent world to practice in the Holy Monument, which is not only the safest retreat place in the Holy Realm, but also a place of opportunity. Only in the Holy Monument World can there be any hope of refining the soul to the level of the Holy Light Soul, that is, the Holy Soul! The reason why many Supreme Domain Ancestors have stayed at the Supreme Strength Domain Ancestor level is to raise their souls to the Holy Soul. Just being promoted to an Invincible Domain Ancestor at the Soul Holy Light level was not their goal. There is a big difference between being promoted to an Invincible Domain Ancestor with a Holy Soul and being promoted to an Invincible Domain Ancestor with a Soul Holy Light. Once promoted to the Invincible Domain Ancestor with the Holy Soul, the strength will be extremely strong, and a Natal Sacred Technique will be born! The Natal Sacred Technique does not need a Holy Endowment, and it is inherently suitable for oneself. It can be said that once a Supreme Domain Ancestor is promoted to an Invincible Domain Ancestor with a Holy Soul, he will immediately become an existence comparable to that of a Holy Gift, and his potential and strength are far beyond that of ordinary Invincible Domain Ancestors! But the Natal Sacred Technique is different, it is very easy to cultivate the Natal Sacred Technique, and it can even be cultivated to the extreme level. "

"Holy Soul, Natal Holy Technique, so that's it!"

Ye Tian finally understood why a supreme domain ancestor like the Blue Fish Domain Ancestor had been uncertain about being promoted to an Invincible Domain Ancestor, it turned out that he wanted to be promoted to a Holy Soul, and then to impact the Invincible Domain Ancestor, so that a Natal Saint Technique would be born.

The Natal Sacred Technique is too important to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, once you master a Natal Sacred Technique of the extreme level, it is almost no different from the Holy Endowment, how terrifying is the combat power.

For the vast majority of Invincible Domain Ancestors, becoming a Supreme Domain Ancestor is almost an extravagant hope, and with the Natal Divine Skill, one can almost become an invincible existence at the level of the Invincible Domain Ancestor.

"Light-clothed saintess, do you want a place for the Holy Monument?"

Ye Tian understood the thoughts of the light-clothed saintess.

"That's good!" The light-clothed saint nodded: "The place of the holy monument is very precious, once it is given, the latecomers cannot obtain it, and this thing cannot be transferred." Even if I am the Holy Maiden of the Holy Maiden Gate, the Holy Realm controlled by the Holy Maiden Gate does not have many Holy Monument quotas, and some of the Holy Realm Holy Monument quotas have been used up. Therefore, I tried my best to obtain only one place, but only one Saint Realm Saint Monument quota could not allow me to impact the Holy Soul level, so I need the future Saint Monument quota of the Xuanxu Saint Realm!"

"Yes!"

Ye Tian agreed.

It is conceivable that once the holy monument appears, there will inevitably be many people who want to snatch the quota of the holy monument, and they will come to him one by one when the time comes.

If he didn't have enough strength, he wouldn't be able to keep the place of the Holy Monument at all.

Even if he asked for the help of the Battle Gate, would the Xuanxu Holy Realm still be able to completely control it in his own hands?

The simple thing is that the Holy Monument quota is only attractive to the Supreme Domain Ancestor, not to the Invincible Domain Ancestor, otherwise, the pressure on him will be even greater.
